name: Whiskas Adult Cat Pouches Meaty M/Pak 12x85g
shortDescription: Treat your cat to the wholesome goodness of WHISKAS 1+ Meaty Meals Adult Cat Food in Jelly , crafted to deliver a rich blend of taste and nutrition in every bite. Each pouch is carefully made with high-quality meats to lock in natural flavour and essential nutrients, ensuring your adult cat enjoys a balanced diet that supports strength, vitality, and everyday wellbeing.
description: Give your cat the perfect balance of flavour, nutrition, and satisfaction with WHISKAS 1+ Meaty Meals Adult Cat Food in Jelly . Specially prepared to preserve the natural goodness and delicious taste of high-quality meats, this complete and balanced meal provides everything your adult cat needs to stay healthy, strong, and full of life. Made with sustainably sourced ingredients and crafted with care, each pouch contains essential nutrients that promote vitality, a shiny coat, strong muscles, and a robust immune system. With mouth-watering recipes featuring beef, chicken, lamb, and poultry , your cat will enjoy every bite while receiving 100% of their daily nutritional needs. Key Benefits Complete & Balanced Nutrition – Provides 100% of your adult cat’s daily dietary requirements. • Strong Muscles – Packed with high-quality protein from meat to maintain strength and agility. • Supports Immunity – Enriched with Vitamin C to boost natural defences. • Healthy Skin & Coat – Contains essential zinc for a soft, glossy coat and healthy skin. • Sustainably Sourced Ingredients – Prepared responsibly with a commitment to reducing environmental impact. • Irresistible Variety – Includes four meaty flavours in jelly: beef, chicken, lamb, and poultry. Ingredients With Beef: Meat and animal derivatives (35%, including 4% beef in the chunk*), cereals, minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin, various sugars. With Chicken: Meat and animal derivatives (35%, including 4% chicken in the chunk*), cereals, minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin, various sugars. With Lamb: Meat and animal derivatives (35%, including 4% lamb in the chunk*), cereals, minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin, various sugars. With Poultry: Meat and animal derivatives (35%, including 4% poultry in the chunk*), cereals, minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin, various sugars. *Chunk typically 40% of product. Guaranteed Analysis (Typical Nutritional Values per 100 g) Nutrient Value Protein 7.8% Fat Content 4.0% Crude Fibre 0.25% Inorganic Matter 1.6% Moisture 84.5% Vitamin C 702 mg/kg Vitamin D₃ 200 IU Taurine 620 mg/kg Copper 1.2 mg/kg Iodine 0.22 mg/kg Iron 11.2 mg/kg Manganese 2.2 mg/kg Zinc 16.2 mg/kg Cassia Gum 2148 mg/kg   Why Choose WHISKAS 1+ Meaty Meals Expertly formulated for adult cats aged 1 year and above • Supports muscle health, skin and coat vitality, and immunity • Made with sustainably sourced, high-quality meat ingredients • Delicious variety in rich, savoury jelly • No artificial flavours or preservatives Feeding & Usage Feed according to your cat’s age, weight, and activity level. Serve at room temperature and always provide fresh drinking water. Diet Transition When introducing WHISKAS 1+ Meaty Meals , mix it gradually with your cat’s current food over a period of 7 days : Days 1–2: 25% new / 75% old Days 3–4: 50% new / 50% old Days 5–6: 75% new / 25% old Day 7+: 100% new food Maintain your regular feeding schedule and observe your cat’s behaviour and digestion. Consult your veterinarian if needed during the transition. Storage Instructions Store pouches in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Once opened, refrigerate unused portions and consume within 48 hours.   Give your cat the hearty, meaty taste they love with WHISKAS 1+ Meaty Meals — a delicious, balanced meal designed to support everyday health, strength, and happiness.
